recipes.name: boundary-contract-split
recipes.description: Split boundary analysis from contract verification so the main thread keeps only distilled structural conclusions.
when_to_use: too much exploratory output in the main thread

roles.deliverable: context map, interfaces, and core-vs-edge calls
boundary contract assumptions and invariant candidates

recipes.caution: Spawn explicitly only when the split is clean and bounded. Merge back ledgers and assumptions, not raw exploration logs.

recipes.name: local-stack-triage
recipes.description: Separate docs discovery from runtime bring-up when startup noise threatens the main thread.
when_to_use: docs and environment both look suspicious

roles.deliverable: bounded startup attempt and blocker list

recipes.caution: Do not let the bring-up split widen into unrelated cleanup or implicit infrastructure mutation.

recipes.name: invariant-audit-swarm
recipes.description: Split property design from coverage auditing so the refactor thread keeps only the invariant ledger.

roles.deliverable: which invariants are covered, missing, or weak

recipes.caution: Use this split only when the outputs can be merged as short ledgers rather than parallel raw traces.

recipes.name: canon-vs-summary-pass
recipes.description: Separate authority review from outward-facing summary drafting when documentation drift is the main problem.
recipes.caution: The summary split should reflect the canonical map; it must not redefine canon.
